# Subash Niroula — Portfolio

> Senior Full-Stack Engineer in Tokyo. 6+ years building enterprise products, microservices, and mobile apps with React, Spring Boot, Next.js, and Go — plus AI tooling (Claude orchestration, MCP, multi-agent systems). Pursuing an MS in Computer Science at Georgia Tech (OMSCS). Bilingual EN/JP (IELTS 7.5, JLPT N2 equivalent). AWS Certified Developer – Associate (2026).

## About
- Senior Full-Stack Engineer based in Tokyo, Japan. Builds products 0→1 from architecture through deployment and operations.
- Currently at AXA Life Insurance in Tokyo: multiple projects and microservices, led legacy→microservices migration, optimized SQL queries from ~5 min to under 5s on millions of records, built HR portals with Camunda BPMN workflow automation and edge web apps on Cloudflare Workers.
- Recent flagship (2026): built an internal HR portal 0→1 as sole engineer — Next.js, MUI, Supabase (PostgreSQL), Camunda BPMN approval/onboarding workflows, Docker CI/CD, Playwright E2E, deployed on Vercel.
- Education: MS Computer Science @ Georgia Tech (OMSCS, in progress — CS-6400 Database Systems 94.1/100, CS-7295 GPU Software/Hardware Summer 2026); B.Eng. Computer Engineering, Pokhara University (GPA 3.7/4.0).
- Certifications: AWS Certified Developer – Associate (April 2026).
- AI/LLM tooling: multi-agent orchestration, Claude & Claude Code workflows, MCP tools and servers, local-LLM benchmarking and AI-agent cost optimization, RAG, prompt engineering.
- Best reached on LinkedIn; always glad to connect with other engineers and talk through interesting technical problems.

## Main Page
- [Portfolio](https://subashn.com.np): Full portfolio with experience timeline, skills, projects, education, FAQ, and contact info. Bilingual (English/Japanese).

## GitHub Profile
- [GitHub](https://github.com/subash1999): Profile README with tech stack, stats, and featured work.

## Projects
- [Slack HR Bot](https://github.com/subash1999/slack-hr-bot): Slack-based attendance, leave, payroll system. TypeScript + Google Apps Script. $0/month infrastructure.
- [Loan Calculation App](https://github.com/subash1999/loan-calculation-app): Multi-org loan management with daily interest calculation. Next.js + PostgreSQL + MUI.
- [Golden Sungava Homepage](https://github.com/subash1999/golden-sungava-homepage): Company homepage. Next.js 15 + Supabase + Tailwind CSS.
- [Ride Sharing Platform](https://github.com/nepal-ride-sharing-app): Microservices ride-sharing with React Native apps + Express.js APIs.
- [Thermal Print Bridge](https://github.com/narbada-madhusudhan/nme-print-bridge): Lightweight Go thermal printer bridge for web POS. Single binary, zero deps.
- [Breast Cancer ML Prediction](https://github.com/subash1999/NEC-Study-and-Analysis-of-Breast-Cancer-Using-Genomics): ML pipeline for breast cancer prediction from microarray gene data. 90% test accuracy.
- [DNA Mutation Detection](https://github.com/subash1999/ERASMUS-breast-cancer-detection-by-finding-mutation-in-DNA-sequence): ERASMUS research — breast cancer detection via DNA mutation analysis.
- [Student Information System](https://github.com/subash1999/Student_Information_System): JavaFX desktop app for student results and marksheet generation.

## Skills
Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, Python, Go, PHP, Dart
Frontend: React, Next.js, Angular, React Native, Expo, Flutter, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Spring Boot, Node.js, Express, Hono, Django, Laravel
Database: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, DynamoDB, Supabase
Cloud/DevOps: AWS (S3, EC2, Lambda, CloudWatch), Docker, Jenkins, Cloudflare Workers, Vercel, GitHub Actions
Other: Camunda BPMN, Playwright, MUI, Live2D, Rive

## Writing
- [Medium Profile](https://medium.com/@subash.niroula4455): Technical writing on systems engineering, AI tooling, and developer infrastructure.
- [Cut Claude Max Quota Burn: 9-Model Local LLM Bench on an 18 GB Mac](https://medium.com/@subash.niroula4455/cut-claude-max-quota-burn-9-model-local-llm-bench-on-an-18-gb-mac-6bf65119a0d6): Benchmark of 9 local LLMs (Qwen2.5-Coder, Qwen3, DeepSeek-R1, GPT-OSS, Phi-4) for offloading Claude Code work on an 18 GB MacBook Pro M3 Pro. Covers MCP bridge architecture, caveman compression for token reduction, and Carbon-rendered benchmark scorecard. Repo: github.com/subash1999/claude-local-llm-setup
